task_description: Complete audit and rebuild of the Admin module. Fix duplicate create buttons (keep only body button), fix Riverpod build-time modification errors, fix load failures, add real image upload via Supabase Storage + image_picker, rebuild all CRUD screens with full field specifications (tournaments, teams, players, matches, contests, scoreboard), add cascading dropdowns, Playing XI selection, auto-calculations, proper empty states, and generate a new SQL file for missing columns/tables.

verification.summary: No Flutter SDK in sandbox for flutter analyze. Review fixes applied: (1) createMatch returns match ID (String?) not bool, Playing XI uses it directly, (2) UUID added to upload paths preventing collisions, (3) content type detected from file extension and passed to uploadImage, (4) RLS policies added for storage buckets, (5) debugPrint added to all catch blocks. Verified by grep: no old timestamp-only paths remain, all screens import uuid, all repository catch blocks have debugPrint.
